name: zx-config-manager

metadata.name: zx-config-manager
metadata.summary: zx-config-manager is a tool for managing configuration files.

documentation:
## zx-config-manager 
自定义配置组件，保持轻量级

### 环境变量说明（docker可以通过environment变量进行配置）：
- ZX_CONFIG_PORT：服务端口，默认值：5000
- ZX_CONFIG_PATH：配置目录，默认值：${HOME}/.zx_config/config.json
- ZX_SCHEDULE_ENABLE：是否开启定时renew，默认值：False, 设置为True时，zx-config-manager会定时执行配置renew操作，默认每60s执行一次
- ZX_SCHEDULE_INTERVAL：定时renew间隔，默认值：60s

- ZX_PROCESSES_COUNT：进程数，默认值：2
- ZX_THREADS_COUNT: 线程数，默认值：4

- ZX_DAEMONIZE：是否以守护进程运行，默认前台执行，如果配置该变量（日志路径），会以守护进程方式运行


### 编译说明
```
git clone https://github.com/zx-sdu/zx-config-manager.git
cd zx-config-manager
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
python setup.py install  #. python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel && pip install .

```

### 启动说明
```
zx-config-manager
```
### 停止说明
```
killall zx-config-manager
```

### 卸载说明
```
pip uninstall zx-config-manager
```

### 访问
根据自己定义地址和端口，访问zx-config-manager
```angular2html
http://localhost:5000/
```

### 运行说明

functions.name: main_pkg.load_utils.load_config
documentation: 自定义函数用于加载配置数据

functions.name: main_pkg.app.load_config_from_file
documentation: This function is used to load the config values from a file.

functions.name: main_pkg.app.get_specific_config
documentation:
This function is used to get a specific config value based on the key provided.
\:param key: specific config key
\:return: config value for the given key

functions.name: main_pkg.app.get_all_configs
documentation:
This function is used to get all the config values.
\:return: all config values

functions.name: main_pkg.app.hello_world
documentation:
返回服务器系统信息、时间和欢迎信息
:return:
